main.tlua(2,19): error TLUA100055: Module name 'pkg.init' resolves to the same file as 'pkg'; a module has one canonical name.


==== main.tlua (1 errors) ====
    local a = require("pkg");
    local b = require("pkg.init");
                      ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100055: Module name 'pkg.init' resolves to the same file as 'pkg'; a module has one canonical name.
    a; b;
    
==== pkg/init.tlua (0 errors) ====
    local v = 1;
    return { v = v };
